title: Hearthgrove Cobblemon
description: The Official Modpack for the Hearthgrove Minecraft Server! Adds new biomes, dimensions, pokemon, breeding, shiny hunting methods, and more! (Required for full access to the CobbleCubs server)
body:
The Official Modpack for the CobbleCubs Cobblemon server!

Our server hosts a LOT of pokémon missing from the original mod, including Mega Evolutions, Legendary Fusions, Z-Crystals, almost ALL legendary spawns, and more for you to discover through your journey in Yuvara.

along with new pokémon, CobbleCubs add multiple new biomes for players to explore in each dimension, and a brand new dimension in the Aether with full pokemon spawn logic to assure you can find fitting pokémon througout the entire dimension

Fill the PokéDex, fight through our player ran gyms, start your own business in our player-ran economy, and more!
